description: Declarative skill chains — ordered, named pipelines that capture the skill-index 'multi-skill scenarios' as runnable sequences. Single source for: workflow commands (e.g. /route-complete), the routing reminder hooks, and the eventual `agent-os:plan-skills` planner. agent-os/evals/check.ts asserts every step references a real skill and that the entry step matches a skill-triggers.md trigger. Steps run in order; each step is an existing skill invoked by name.

route-change.description: Adding or changing an API route end-to-end.

schema-change.description: Adding or changing a Drizzle schema / table end-to-end.

worker-change.description: Adding or changing events, queues, or workers.

new-domain.description: Scaffolding a whole new domain or sub-domain (the full DAG).
